上一世，他死于极寒与背叛。
这一世，他绑定宿舍终端，打造末日堡垒，誓要独活至终章。
极寒纪元：-100℃冰封全球，暴雪肆虐，人性在饥寒中崩坏。他的宿舍，是冻土上唯一的温暖孤岛。
瘟病废土：冰川病毒苏醒，感染者化作活尸。堡垒升级空气过滤，隔绝死亡。
焦灼炼狱：极端高温炙烤大地，熔岩喷涌。恒温系统极限运转，抵御冰火两重天。
灭世洪涛：冰川融化，滔天巨浪吞没文明。堡垒进化为深海方舟，于汪洋中独行。
永恒长夜：尘埃遮蔽太阳，永夜降临。最后的幸存者在黑暗中厮杀，而他的堡垒，已成人类最后的微光。
从冰雪中的安全屋，到瘟疫中的隔离区，再到怒海中的方舟，直至永夜下唯一的人造黎明。
这一世，他不再信任任何人。
这一世，他将以钢铁与怒火，独行至世界终章。 “你们曾夺我衣食，推我入风雪。”
“而今，我坐看潮起潮落，纪元更迭。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/329df0d1bf3fa2e511290856f6692266","author":"迎歌","author_id":"","book_id":"7551688695087107134","book_name":"末日堡垒：我将宿舍改造成了房车","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283038","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4505人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7551688754461671998","read_count":"4505","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"537613"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.1","serial_count":"244","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,求生,囤物资,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o0e604d78b2c9b3e7ef357686aa32cac3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432266&x-signature=HDEQUafPlQz9m3kccEi3kijbEEg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6396041430","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144426C1A8F173D3435136F6F0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":
